name: Chocolate Sweetheart Cakes for Two
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugars, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla; beat until smooth. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool on wire rack for 10 minutes before removing from pan.
7. Allow cakes to cool completely.
8. Transfer cakes to cutting board and cut into four pieces using a 3-1/4 inch heart-shaped cookie cutter.
9. Spread chocolate frosting on top of two cake pieces.
10. Place remaining two hearts on top garnished with decorating icing.
11. Makes 2 small cakes.
For the Chocolate Frosting:
1. Melt butter in a microwave-safe bowl for 20 seconds.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together powdered sugar and cocoa powder.
3. Add to melted butter while stirring constantly.
4. Gradually add milk until desired consistency is reached.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Drizzle frosting over cooled cakes as desired.
